## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Rapyd and GrowthX to discuss content production, performance metrics, and address tone/quality concerns.](https://fathom.video/share/gXG1BFQRY-3X3A3eGVbYDou4aBi8rKC9?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [New Looker report provides more comprehensive data on content performance, but some Search Console data issues need resolution](https://fathom.video/share/gXG1BFQRY-3X3A3eGVbYDou4aBi8rKC9?tab=summary&timestamp=309.0)
  - [Content tone/quality concerns raised; team to review exemplar posts and refine briefs/artifacts to better align with Rapyd's voice](https://fathom.video/share/gXG1BFQRY-3X3A3eGVbYDou4aBi8rKC9?tab=summary&timestamp=379.0)
  - [XML import for blog posts now working with minor image-related issues to be resolved](https://fathom.video/share/gXG1BFQRY-3X3A3eGVbYDou4aBi8rKC9?tab=summary&timestamp=333.0)

## Topics

### New Looker Report Overview

  - [Comprehensive data on content performance across branded/non-branded URLs](https://fathom.video/share/gXG1BFQRY-3X3A3eGVbYDou4aBi8rKC9?tab=summary&timestamp=470.0)
  - [Tracks sessions, engaged sessions, referral sources (incl. LLMs)](https://fathom.video/share/gXG1BFQRY-3X3A3eGVbYDou4aBi8rKC9?tab=summary&timestamp=526.0)
  - [Some Search Console data missing since June 10th; team investigating](https://fathom.video/share/gXG1BFQRY-3X3A3eGVbYDou4aBi8rKC9?tab=summary&timestamp=622.0)
  - [New features: cohort analysis, query performance tracking, LLM referral breakdown](https://fathom.video/share/gXG1BFQRY-3X3A3eGVbYDou4aBi8rKC9?tab=summary&timestamp=464.0)

### Content Production Updates

  - [7 articles to be delivered this week](https://fathom.video/share/gXG1BFQRY-3X3A3eGVbYDou4aBi8rKC9?tab=summary&timestamp=318.0)
  - [Payment liability shift article to be rewritten based on feedback](https://fathom.video/share/gXG1BFQRY-3X3A3eGVbYDou4aBi8rKC9?tab=summary&timestamp=324.0)
  - [XML files for blog posts sent; minor image-related issues being addressed](https://fathom.video/share/gXG1BFQRY-3X3A3eGVbYDou4aBi8rKC9?tab=summary&timestamp=333.0)

### Content Quality Concerns

  - [Mark noticed a shift in tone/quality since platform change](https://fathom.video/share/gXG1BFQRY-3X3A3eGVbYDou4aBi8rKC9?tab=summary&timestamp=1539.0)
  - [Issues: disconnected writing, lack of context, overly technical without actionable insights](https://fathom.video/share/gXG1BFQRY-3X3A3eGVbYDou4aBi8rKC9?tab=summary&timestamp=1550.0)
  - [Team to review 3-5 exemplar posts that nail Rapyd's tone](https://fathom.video/share/gXG1BFQRY-3X3A3eGVbYDou4aBi8rKC9?tab=summary&timestamp=1654.0)
  - [Will refine briefs, artifacts, and potentially test different technical levels](https://fathom.video/share/gXG1BFQRY-3X3A3eGVbYDou4aBi8rKC9?tab=summary&timestamp=1639.0)

### Performance Metrics

  - [Sessions increased for existing URLs](https://fathom.video/share/gXG1BFQRY-3X3A3eGVbYDou4aBi8rKC9?tab=summary&timestamp=1442.0)
  - [Engaged session rate (\>50%) exceeding benchmarks](https://fathom.video/share/gXG1BFQRY-3X3A3eGVbYDou4aBi8rKC9?tab=summary&timestamp=1456.0)
  - [More data needed as content volume increases to draw meaningful insights](https://fathom.video/share/gXG1BFQRY-3X3A3eGVbYDou4aBi8rKC9?tab=summary&timestamp=1470.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Mark to provide 3-5 blog posts that exemplify ideal Rapyd tone](https://fathom.video/share/gXG1BFQRY-3X3A3eGVbYDou4aBi8rKC9?tab=summary&timestamp=1700.0)
  - [Mara to review highlighted content piece for comprehensive understanding of tone issues](https://fathom.video/share/gXG1BFQRY-3X3A3eGVbYDou4aBi8rKC9?tab=summary&timestamp=1707.0)
  - [Team to refine content briefs and artifacts, focusing on use cases and target audience](https://fathom.video/share/gXG1BFQRY-3X3A3eGVbYDou4aBi8rKC9?tab=summary&timestamp=1964.0)
  - [Discuss content artifacts in next week's call (add to agenda)](https://fathom.video/share/gXG1BFQRY-3X3A3eGVbYDou4aBi8rKC9?tab=summary&timestamp=2549.0)
  - [Nicolette to review human-written blog posts for on-brand voice examples](https://fathom.video/share/gXG1BFQRY-3X3A3eGVbYDou4aBi8rKC9?tab=summary&timestamp=2552.0)
  - [Investigate and resolve Search Console data issues](https://fathom.video/share/gXG1BFQRY-3X3A3eGVbYDou4aBi8rKC9?tab=summary&timestamp=712.0)
  - [Address XML import image-related issues](https://fathom.video/share/gXG1BFQRY-3X3A3eGVbYDou4aBi8rKC9?tab=summary&timestamp=333.0)
